The '''Carosus system''',<ref name="PoG2" /> also known as the '''Carosi system''',<ref name="TEA-OC" /> was a twelve-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]<ref name="PoG2" /> that was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> The five innermost planets were destroyed by the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Carosi]] in [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]] when it expanded into a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]].<ref name="PoG2" />

{{System-stub}}
